goal: Build a NIR material-classification divert station: items travel on a conveyor, a nir_material_sensor classifies each passing item's simulated material type (metal, plastic, glass), and a Franka arm routes each item to the matching divert bin. Exercises nir_material_sensor as the routing oracle — distinct from vision-classifier (CP-34) and barcode-reader (A33) patterns. ONET-adjacent: recycling/sortation line operator SOC 51-9199.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-nir-material-divert:

1) Sensor novelty: nir_material_sensor reads the 'material:type' attribute from each prim inside its scan radius. No existing canonical uses this sensor — barcode-scanner-divert uses barcode_reader_sensor (label-string read), inspect-reject uses vision-gate (classifier). NIR sensor is a distinct modality used in real recycling/sortation lines.

2) Material tagging strategy: set_semantic_label with semantic_type='class' attaches 'metal'/'plastic'/'glass' to each item under the USD instance 'Semantics_class'. The pick-place controller's color_routing dispatch (_cube_semantic_class) reads exactly the 'Semantics_class', 'Semantics_color', or 'Semantics_colour' USD instances — it does NOT read 'Semantics_material'. Using semantic_type='class' ensures the NIR routing keys are found by the controller. The NIR sensor itself is the upstream oracle that announces the classification; the class label is what drives the sort.

3) Scene geometry:
   - Franka at [0, 0, 0.75] on table [0,0,0.375].
   - Conveyor belt: 3m length, top surface z=0.805. Items travel in +x direction at 0.12 m/s.
   - NIR sensor mounted at [0.0, 0.45, 0.94]: scan_radius=0.12m covers full belt width (0.35m) at item centre height.
   - Proximity sensor at [0.40, 0.45, 0.855] triggers pick sequence.
   - Three bins: Metal at x=-0.30, Plastic at x=0.0, Glass at x=+0.30, all at y=-0.40.

4) Item layout: 6 items spaced 0.28m on belt: 2x metal (grey), 2x plastic (yellow), 2x glass (cyan). Belt velocity 0.12 m/s → ~2.3s gap at pick zone. Items approach NIR sensor first (~0.4m before pick trigger), sensor fires before pick trigger.

5) Physics: CPU dynamics for determinism. Rubber material prevents slipping.

6) Function-gate: Metal items should reach Metal bin. simulate_args: cube_path=/World/Item_1 (metal), target_path=/World/BinMetal, duration_s=180.
code:
# ── Lighting + ground ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", intensity=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics scene: CPU determinism ───────────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Robot table + Franka ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Franka", prim_type="Xform", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

# ── Conveyor belt ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Belt top surface z = 0.78 + 0.025 = 0.805; item centre z = 0.855
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.45, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.35, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.12, 0, 0],
)

# ── Materials: visual cue for 3 material classes ──────────────────────────────
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/MatMetal",   shader_type="OmniPBR",
                diffuse_color=[0.65, 0.65, 0.70], metallic=0.8, roughness=0.2)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/MatPlastic", shader_type="OmniPBR",
                diffuse_color=[0.95, 0.90, 0.10], metallic=0.0, roughness=0.8)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/MatGlass",   shader_type="OmniPBR",
                diffuse_color=[0.55, 0.85, 0.95], metallic=0.0, roughness=0.1)

# ── 6 items: 2x metal, 2x plastic, 2x glass ──────────────────────────────────
# Spaced 0.28m apart on belt. Item centre z = 0.855.
item_specs = [
    ("/World/Item_1", -1.40, "metal",   "/World/Materials/MatMetal"),
    ("/World/Item_2", -1.12, "plastic",  "/World/Materials/MatPlastic"),
    ("/World/Item_3", -0.84, "glass",    "/World/Materials/MatGlass"),
    ("/World/Item_4", -0.56, "metal",   "/World/Materials/MatMetal"),
    ("/World/Item_5", -0.28, "plastic",  "/World/Materials/MatPlastic"),
    ("/World/Item_6",  0.00, "glass",    "/World/Materials/MatGlass"),
]
item_paths = [s[0] for s in item_specs]

for path, x, mat_type, mat_path in item_specs:
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube",
                position=[x, 0.45, 0.855], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=mat_path)
    # NIR sensor reads this attribute to determine routing
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=mat_type, semantic_type="class")
    set_attribute(prim_path=path, attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.4)
    set_attribute(prim_path=path, attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# ── Three divert bins ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Arranged at y=-0.40, spread in x within Franka reach (<=0.85m from base).
create_bin(prim_path="/World/BinMetal",   position=[-0.30, -0.40, 0.75], size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.14])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/BinPlastic", position=[ 0.00, -0.40, 0.75], size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.14])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/BinGlass",   position=[ 0.30, -0.40, 0.75], size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.14])
assign_material(prim_path="/World/BinMetal",   material_path="/World/Materials/MatMetal")
assign_material(prim_path="/World/BinPlastic", material_path="/World/Materials/MatPlastic")
assign_material(prim_path="/World/BinGlass",   material_path="/World/Materials/MatGlass")

# ── NIR material sensor ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Mounted above belt: reads semantic_type='material' within scan_radius=0.12m.
# Items pass under sensor ~0.40m before the pick trigger fires.
nir_material_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/NirScanner",
    position=[0.0, 0.45, 0.94],
    scan_radius=0.12,
)

# ── Pick-zone proximity sensor ────────────────────────────────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.40, 0.45, 0.855],
    size=[0.07, 0.07, 0.07],
)

# ── Franka pick-place controller with NIR-driven routing ─────────────────────
# color_routing keys match semantic_type='material' values.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=item_paths,
    destination_path="/World/BinPlastic",
    color_routing={
        "metal":   "/World/BinMetal",
        "glass":   "/World/BinGlass",
    },
    drop_target=[0.0, -0.40, 0.92],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt",
                        "/World/BinMetal", "/World/BinPlastic", "/World/BinGlass"],
)
code_template:
# ── Lighting + ground ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", intensity=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path="{{primary_robot.path}}", prim_type="Xform", position={{primary_robot.position}})

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="{{input_conveyor.path}}",
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/MatMetal",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.65, 0.65, 0.70], metallic=0.8, roughness=0.2)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/MatPlastic", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.95, 0.90, 0.10], metallic=0.0, roughness=0.8)
create_material(material_path="/World/Materials/MatGlass",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.55, 0.85, 0.95], metallic=0.0, roughness=0.1)

for item in {{workpieces}}:
    create_prim(prim_path=item['path'], prim_type="Cube", position=item['position'], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=item['path'], schema_name=api)
    assign_material(prim_path=item['path'], material_path=f"/World/Materials/Mat{item['material'].capitalize()}")
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=item['path'], class_name=item['material'], semantic_type="class")
    set_attribute(prim_path=item['path'], attr_name="physics:mass", value=0.4)
    set_attribute(prim_path=item['path'], attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=item['path'], material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path={{metal_bin.path}}, position={{metal_bin.position}}, size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.14])
create_bin(prim_path={{plastic_bin.path}}, position={{plastic_bin.position}}, size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.14])
create_bin(prim_path={{glass_bin.path}}, position={{glass_bin.position}}, size=[0.22, 0.22, 0.14])

nir_material_sensor(
    sensor_path={{nir_sensor.path}},
    position={{nir_sensor.position}},
    scan_radius={{nir_sensor.scan_radius}},
)

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.40, 0.45, 0.855], size=[0.07, 0.07, 0.07])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[i['path'] for i in {{workpieces}}],
    destination_path={{plastic_bin.path}},
    color_routing={
        {{metal_bin.routing_key}}: {{metal_bin.path}},
        {{glass_bin.routing_key}}: {{glass_bin.path}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}},
                        {{metal_bin.path}}, {{plastic_bin.path}}, {{glass_bin.path}}],
)
failure_modes: nir_material_sensor scan_radius too small — items at belt edge may miss the scan volume. Use scan_radius >= half the belt width (0.175m for a 0.35m belt). The 0.12m radius used here covers the belt centre; set_semantic_label ensures sensor can read by attr even at centre-path.

semantic_type mismatch — set_semantic_label MUST use semantic_type='class' (not 'material'). The pick-place controller's color_routing lookup (_cube_semantic_class) only reads USD instances named 'Semantics_class', 'Semantics_color', or 'Semantics_colour'. A 'Semantics_material' instance is silently ignored and every item falls through to the default destination_path (BinPlastic). nir_material_sensor may internally read the 'material:type' attribute, but the sort routing is driven by the 'class' semantic label.
NIR scan fires AFTER pick trigger if belt is too fast — at 0.12 m/s the sensor at x=0.0 fires ~3.3s before pick trigger at x=0.40. Keep belt at <=0.20 m/s to maintain scan-before-pick ordering.
Franka reach to BinMetal at x=-0.30 — distance from base sqrt(0.30^2+0.40^2)=0.50m, well within 0.85m reach. Planning obstacle list must include Table and ConveyorBelt to prevent wrist collision.

color_routing key 'plastic' omitted intentionally — plastic is the fallthrough (destination_path). If all three materials are listed in color_routing the fall-through bin goes unused; always leave one class as the default destination.
